personal_information.current_designation: M Sc. Statistics (12+ Years of experience as Biostatistician and Academician)

experience.organization: Muljibhai Patel Urological Hospital (MPUH), Nadiad, Gujarat
experience.description: Responsible for writing Statistical Analysis Plan, preparing master file into analyzable form, analysis of hospital data with the help of different software like SPSS, R-Language and MEDCALC as per the Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP), making Graphics using software like SPSS, MS EXCEL, R-Language and MS POWERPOINT, reporting and interpreting the outcome of the analysis, writing and reviewing in statistical part of DNB projects, Company Grants, Govt. Projects

Guided 93 various projects regarding Statistics, Six Sigma, ISO, Marketing research, 5S implementation and seven quality control tools implementation in industry. Taught the statistics subjects (Marketing Research, Design of Experiments, Statistical Quality Control and Reliability, Multivariate techniques, Business Statistics etc.) Also taught practicals based on Excel, Minitb, SPSS and R-language. Work as academic incharge and Project as well as job placement incharge.
